title.en: How Tuchel is still searching for solutions out wide - Shearer
title.zh-CN: Tuchel如何仍在广泛寻找解决方案- Shearer

summary.en: Former England captain Alan Shearer explains why there are lots of reasons to be positive about England so far at this World Cup, but having a settled side is not one of them.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰队队长艾伦·希勒（ Alan Shearer ）解释了为什么到目前为止，在本届世界杯上有很多理由对英格兰持积极态度，但拥有一支稳定的球队并不是其中之一。

title.en: Clarke says standing down 'easy' decision after World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 克拉克说，在世界杯退出后放弃“轻松”的决定

summary.en: Steve Clarke says it was an easy decision to step down as Scotland head coach because he always planned to depart if they did not qualify for the knock-out stages.
summary.zh-CN: 史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）表示，辞去苏格兰主教练一职很容易，因为如果他们没有资格参加淘汰赛阶段，他总是计划离开。

title.en: Why Netherlands v Morocco is more than just a match
title.zh-CN: 为什么荷兰对摩洛哥不仅仅是一场比赛

summary.en: Morocco’s World Cup meeting with the Netherlands tells a story about migration, identity and the battle for Dutch-born talent.
summary.zh-CN: 摩洛哥与荷兰的世界杯会面讲述了一个关于移民、身份认同和争夺荷兰出生人才的故事。

title.en: Move over Messi and Ronaldo - the new generation shining at World Cup
title.zh-CN: 超越梅西和罗纳尔多--在世界杯上闪耀的新一代

summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport观察了五名年轻球员，他们与老将莱昂内尔·梅西和克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多在同一个世界杯舞台上留下了深刻的印象。

title.en: Could a heatwave make World Cup matches 'unsafe' this week?
title.zh-CN: 热浪会使本周的世界杯比赛“不安全”吗？

summary.en: Temperatures are expected to soar across parts of the US and Canada this week which could bring significant health impacts to some World Cup matches.
summary.zh-CN: 预计本周美国和加拿大部分地区的气温将飙升，这可能会对一些世界杯比赛的健康产生重大影响。

title.en: Why 'big brother' Van Dijk is key to Dutch World Cup dreams
title.zh-CN: 为什么“大哥”范迪克是荷兰世界杯梦想的关键

summary.en: France's World Cup winner Olivier Giroud explains why Netherlands defender Virgil van Dijk is still the main man for his national team.

title.en: Sackings, death threats and fury – World Cup exit leaves South Korean football in crisis
